differentials.name: Tetralogy of Fallot with pulmonary atresia
differentials.raw: Tetralogy of Fallot with pulmonary atresia (= pseudotruncus)

differentials.name: VSD + pulmonary atresia
differentials.raw: VSD + pulmonary atresia (single ventricle, complete transposition, corrected transposition)

Tetralogy of Fallot with pulmonary atres: coarse vascular pattern with irregular branching arteries (from aorta / subclavian arteries)
small central vessels despite apparent ↑ in vascularity Decreased Pulmonary Vascularity =  obstruction to pulmonary flow
small pulmonary artery segment + hilar vessels

context: √  coarse vascular pattern with irregular branching arteries (from aorta / subclavian arteries) √  small central vessels despite apparent ↑ in vascularity Decreased Pulmonary Vascularity =  obstruction to pulmonary flow √  vessels reduced in size and number √  hyperlucent lungs √  small pulmonary artery segment + hilar vessels
